node.statement: For a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding j (so ||jM||=||M|| and ||j||_op=1) and a unital positive C, with Phi=Cj and F=jC, the operator-norm idempotency defects satisfy ||Phi^2-Phi|| <= ||F^2-F||; hence ||F^2-F|| <= eta < 1/4 forces ||Phi^2-Phi|| <= eta < 1/4, so P=theta(2Phi-1) is well-defined.
